word: G1332 - διετής - dietḗs - dee-et-ace' - Two years old

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διετής

- Transliteration: Dietes

- Phonetic: dee-et-ace'

- Definition:

1. of two years, two years old

- Origin: from G1364 and G2094

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1364 and G2094; of two years (in age): - two years old.
